mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Strong monthly payroll growth above 100k signals robust labor market conditions that boost consumer spending and corporate earnings, driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 60% of instances where PAYEMS exceeds 100k.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in GDP and declining unemployment signals strong economic momentum, creating positive forward returns for the S&P 500 over the next 20 trading days through improved corporate profitability and investor sentiment.
failure_condition: The joint effect of GDPC1 growth and UNRATE decline fails to produce positive returns in > 50% of cases, or the interaction term's coefficient is statistically insignificant (p > 0.10).

mechanism_narrative: A 2-month increase in housing starts above 850k signals rising construction activity and consumer confidence, generating positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days through sectoral demand spillovers.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in > 60% of instances where HOUST exceeds 850k.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly CPI reading below 230 indicates disinflationary pressures that prompt central bank rate cuts, creating positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days through re-rating of growth assets.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in > 60% of instances where CPIAUCSL is below 230.

mechanism_narrative: High unemployment rates above 7.5% signal slack in the labor market that constrains wage growth and corporate margins, leading to negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days through earnings downgrades.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60d returns in > 60% of instances where UNRATE exceeds 7.5%.

mechanism_narrative: A 2-month increase in industrial production above 97.5 signals rising manufacturing activity that boosts corporate earnings, generating positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 60d returns in > 60% of instances where INDPRO exceeds 97.5.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in consumer spending and housing starts indicates broad-based demand expansion, creating positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days through sectoral demand synergies.
failure_condition: The joint effect of RSAFS and HOUST growth fails to produce positive returns in > 50% of cases, or the interaction term's coefficient is statistically insignificant (p > 0.10).
